titleStmt.title: SII 26.681: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 681. (A.R. No. 636 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same shrine.
This inscription is damaged in some places. It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara, etc.

It records a gift of one tūṇi of paddy daily to a certain Kāri Tillaiyvāṇan alias Tirukkuraṅgāḍutuṟaiyp-pichchaṉ to whom the māḍāpattiyam of the temple of the god Tirunallamuḍaiyār of Tirunallam, a Brahmadēyam in Veṇṇāḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu, belonged, by the sabhai of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .
tirumaṉṉi
maṭa
ntaiyum poṟ
ceyaṟ pāvaiyu
m cirttaṉic cel
viyuntan perun
teviyarākil Inpuṟu
neṭituyilūḻi
Uḷiṭai tuṟai
nāṭun tuṭarvana
vevippaṭar vanavā
ciyuñ cuḷḷi cūḻ matiḷ
koḷḷippākkamum na
ṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇai
kaṭakkamum porukaṭali
ḻattaraiyar tamuṭiyum
Āṅkavaṉ teviya
r Oṅkeḻil muṭi
yu muṉṉavan
pakkal tenna
van vaitta cun
taramuṭiyu
intira ṉāra
munteṇṭirai
Īḻamaṇṭalamu
ḻuvalu Eṟipaṭaikkaḷa
ran muṟaimaiyiṟ cū
ṭuṅ kulatanamākiya
palar pukaḷmuṭiyuñ
ceṅkatirmālaiyuñ
caṅkatirvelait
tolperuṅ
kāval palpaḻa
ntivum ceruvi
ṟ cenavi
lirupatto
rukālarai
cukaḷai keṭṭa
paracurāman
mevaruñ cānti
maṟṟivaraṇ karuti
Iruttiya cem
poṟṟiruttakumuṭi
yum payaṅkoṭu pa
ḻimika mucaṅkiyil mu
tukiṭṭoḷitta ce
yaciṅkanaḷapperu
mpukaḷoṭum pi
ṭiyaliraṭṭapāṭi
Eḻarai Ilakkamum
Avanetik kulap
perumalaikaḷum
vikkirama virar
cakkarakoṭṭa
mumu cirpaṭava
llai matirai
maṇṭalamuṅ kā
miṭai vaḷar nāma
ṇakkoṇaiyum
veñcilai virapañ
cappaḷḷiyum pācaṭai
yppaḻana mācuṇi
tecamum Ayarvaṇ
kirttiyātinakaravai
yil cantiranṟolku
lattintiraratanai viṟai
yamaṟkkaḷattuk kiḷaiyo
ṭum piṭittuppala
tanat to
ṭu niṟai
ṭu kaṭalac
ṉai veñ
rakatakatta
tatāḷiyoṇ
yāṉaiyum peṇṭi
r peṇṭāra
ttil neṭu
kulatanak kuvai
yuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ce
ṟimuṉai Oṭṭa vi
ṣaiyamum
pūcurar cer nala
k kocalainā
ṭun tanmapāla
ṉai vemmuṉai
Aḻittu vaṇ
ṭuṟai colaitta
ṇṭaputtiyum I
raṇacūraṉai muraṇu
ṟattākki takkaṇakirt
tit takkaṇalāṭamuṅ
kovintacantan mā
viḻin toṭat taṅ
kāta(l) cāra(na)l vaṅ
kāḷatecamun to
lkulavaṭṭa mayipāla
māvi
ñcuvi
ṭiṟavi
ṇaṭi
mun
kaṭalu
mum ve
ṟi malarttirat
tat teṟipuna
ṟ kaṅkaiyum
Alaikaṭal na
ṭuviṟ pala kala
ñ celutti ca
ṅkirāmavicaiya
tuṅkapanmanā
kiya kiṭārattaraiya
ṉai vākaiyam poru
kaṭakkum pakkari Oṭu
makappaṭutturimai
yiṟ piṟakkiya perune
tip piṟakkamum Ārtta
van kānakarp port
toḻil vācalil
veccātiratoraṇa
mum mottoḷi puṉaiy ma
ṇipputalamuṅ kanamaṇi
kkatavamuniṟai śrīvi
caiyamuntuṟainir
paṉṉaiyum malaiyūrai
Eyiṟṟoṉmalaiyūr
cūḻkaṭalakaḻ māyi[ ]
liṅkamum kalaṅkā
muṅkoppuṟu ni
ṟaiṉel mu māppā
pāḷamuṅ kā
valam puricai
mevilina
paṅkaḻu viḷai
ppantūṟi
ṭaiyavaḷai
yppantūṟum kalaittakkor pukaḻttalait ttamāvalavaṉai mātamaliṅkamuṅ kalāmurik kaṭuntiṟalār muritecamun tenakkalar mānakkavāramun toṭukaṭakāval karumuraṭkaṭāramum māpporu taṇṭālkoṇṭa kopparakesaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār
śrīririRead śrī rāº jentracoḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 10 1 Āvatu Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmade(te)yam tirunallattu sabhaiyom Eṅkaḷukku Iṭai Īṭuvakaiy ceykinṟa koṭṭi Uṭaiy Uṭaiyār (uṭaiyār) tiru nallamuṭaiyār ko
yil māṭāpattiyamuṭaiya kāri tillaiyavāṇa tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟaippiccaṉukku Ivan varkattāṟkku nicata I tūṇinel koḷḷalām paricu kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭuvittuk kuṭukkavenṟu Inakku tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiya tirumukam prasātañ ceytaruḷivanta te
tāṅkaḷum Ipparicu kalliluñ cempilum Enkaṇ kāṇioṭu veṭṭuvittuk kuṭukkavenṟu Iṭaiyiṭuvar nāṅkaḷ Ivkaṇkāṇi kiḻiñalūr kiḻavan kāśyapan kāṟāyilā[ tapaṉ] Oṭumakakuṭa Ikkāri tillaiyvāṇanāna tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟaiy piccanukkum I
van vaṟkattāṟkku nicatan tūṇi ne I Ittevar paṇṭārattey koḷḷap peṟuvārkaḷāka kallil veṭṭuvittuk kuṭuttom tirunallattu sabhaiyom panmāheśvarara
kṣai . 0 § . 0 §
Digital edition of SII 26.681 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
